name: Bizcochitos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the fat and sugar until quite creamy.
2. Add the egg and beat until very fluffy.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt; add to the creamed mixture.
4. Stir in the wine and anise seed.
5. Roll the dough into a 1/4-inch thick sheet and cut into plain squares or fancy shapes.
6. Combine the topping ingredients (sugar and cinnamon) and sprinkle over each cookie.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 15-20 minutes, or until light brown. This recipe freezes well.
